docs.title: About
docs.text: Founded by Anton Vynohradov, SystemFromScratch® combines deep embedded engineering expertise with cybersecurity and certification-focused product development.

docs.title: Vision
docs.text:
Build a multidisciplinary engineering consultancy specializing in:

  • Embedded systems
  • Hardware integration
  • Cybersecurity
  • Regulatory readiness
  • Certification support

docs.title: Goal
docs.text: Reduce regulatory risk while accelerating secure market access.

docs.title: Cybersecurity Engineering
docs.text:
SystemFromScratch® designs secure embedded systems with focus on:

  • Secure boot
  • Firmware integrity
  • Threat modeling
  • Secure communication
  • Vulnerability reduction
  • Regulatory cybersecurity requirements
